name: bangla-blood
description: Bangla Blood - production-ready MERN stack monorepo

scripts.dev: concurrently "npm run dev --workspace server" "npm run dev --workspace client"
scripts.build: npm run build --workspace client && npm run build --workspace server
scripts.lint: npm run lint --workspace client && npm run lint --workspace server
scripts.lint:fix: npm run lint:fix --workspace client && npm run lint:fix --workspace server
scripts.format: npm run format --workspace client && npm run format --workspace server
